reviews.comment:
Hay que ir con tiempo por que hay muy poco personal y si pediste factura no tienen papel, hay que esperar. Osea paciencia.

(Translated by Google)
You have to arrive early because there are very few staff members, and if you asked for an invoice, they don't have paper, so you'll have to wait. So, be patient.
